_description: TOMAS DSL Macro Library for ARC-AGI-3 Solver (Δ-State引擎 + RHAE预算 + 神经启发架构(LSTM/ResNet/Transformer/Hopfield) + 循环原语拓扑囚禁 + EML中继节点 + Motif IC + 金币proximity + 紧急coin收集 + Liu机制S_rel + EML超图 + 卞氏三域 + 对象级搜索 + Δ-State Replay + κ-gradient oracle + ka59/ar25/tn36 Δ-State Replay solver + κ-PS fallback)
_note: v3.18.0 — ka59/ar25/tn36 Δ-State Replay + κ-gradient oracle (replaces BFS+deepcopy) | v3.17.0 — PTS孤子判别 + DOGA评分(O/G/A) + YinLong阴龙运算(八元数非结合) + 天行方程校验(Xi=tanh(S²)) | v3.16.0 — 神经启发架构(RecurrentDSL/GatedDSL/AdvancedDSL/neuro_kps) + EML中继节点(interneurons) + Motif IC(2-cycle/3-cycle) + 金币proximity + 紧急coin收集 + Δ-State引擎 + RHAE预算 | v3.15.3 — LS20 L1通关(trigger间紧急coin+BFS remaining限制) | v3.14.0 — Liu S_rel + EML + 卞氏三域 + 对象级搜索 + 零分游戏专项 | v3.13.0 — κ-PS + Ψ-Cut pruning

abstractions.name: macro_click_ring_expansion
abstractions.gaussex_precond: has_sprite_type('clickable') AND sprite_count('goal') >= 1 AND NOT has_sprite_type('wall')

abstractions.name: macro_keyboard_push_blocks
abstractions.gaussex_precond: has_keyboard_actions() AND NOT has_click_action() AND sprite_count('pushable') >= 1

abstractions.name: macro_pair_elimination_keyboard
abstractions.gaussex_precond: has_keyboard_actions() AND NOT has_click_action() AND has_symmetric_sprites()

abstractions.name: macro_cipher_variant_navigation
abstractions.gaussex_precond: has_keyboard_actions() AND NOT has_click_action() AND has_variant_system()

abstractions.name: macro_tu93_short_navigation
abstractions.gaussex_precond: has_keyboard_actions() AND NOT has_click_action() AND NOT has_special_action()

abstractions.name: macro_lp85_simple_clicks
abstractions.gaussex_precond: has_click_action() AND NOT has_keyboard_actions() AND sparse_grid()

abstractions.name: macro_sp80_simple_special
abstractions.gaussex_precond: has_keyboard_actions() AND has_special_action() AND NOT has_click_action()

abstractions.name: macro_sb26_short_clicks
abstractions.gaussex_precond: has_click_action() AND NOT has_keyboard_actions() AND sparse_grid()

dsl_sequence.solve: Xi = tanh(S²) where S = Σ W_i ⊗ P_i × dt

dsl_sequence.interpret: Xi → 1 = phase success, Xi < 1/6 = phase failure
